root.sql:
select sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no as memno, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no ) as memname, sc_mem_edit_salary.entry_id as entry_id, si_security_user.user_name, sc_mem_edit_salary.operate_date as operate_date, sc_mem_edit_salary.pre_salary_amount as old, to_snumber(sc_mem_edit_salary.salary_amount) as new,
sc_mem_edit_address.pre_address_no, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_moo, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_road, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_soi, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_tambol, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_district_code, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_province_code, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_postcode, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_telephone, sc_mem_edit_address.pre_mooban,
sc_mem_edit_address.address_no, sc_mem_edit_address.moo, sc_mem_edit_address.road, sc_mem_edit_address.soi, sc_mem_edit_address.tambol, sc_mem_edit_address.district_code, sc_mem_edit_address.province_code, sc_mem_edit_address.postcode, sc_mem_edit_address.telephone, sc_mem_edit_address.mooban
from sc_mem_edit_salary, sc_mem_edit_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, si_security_user where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no and sc_mem_edit_address.membership_no = sc_mem_edit_salary.membership_no and si_security_user.user_id = sc_mem_edit_salary.entry_id /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_mem_edit_salary.operate_date between to_date('2020-5-22 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and to_date('2020-5-22 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
